title: CEO's Actionable Recommendations (6-12 Months)
content:
**Credit Quality and Collections**
- Reduce delinquency exposure in Used Vehicle loans by deploying intensified collections protocols for the $316.8 million segment currently driving 64% of total delinquent balances.
- Tighten underwriting standards specifically for New Vehicle loan originations to prevent further accumulation of the $145.1 million risk concentration identified as a secondary source of losses.
- Increase allowance provisioning by reversing the recent 0.7% quarter-over-quarter decline in reserves given that rising delinquency ratios now exceed prior levels despite lower charge-offs.
